_comment: Derived from access-profiles.ttl. When a SPARQL engine is available in the vault, load the TTL directly. Until then this JSON is the working registry.

profiles.label: My Vault — Owner Workspace
profiles.description: Your own vault, on your computer. Full access to all records, documents, and settings. Authenticated by your vault PIN on your phone.

profiles.label: Emergency / First Responder
profiles.description: Paramedic or ambulance crew. Critical information only, when you may be unconscious. Pre-authorised by you when setting up this profile. Time-limited to 2 hours. All access permanently logged.

profiles.label: Emergency Department
profiles.description: ED clinician treating you in hospital. Full clinical picture for safe treatment when you cannot consent directly. Logged for 4 hours.

profiles.label: General Practitioner
profiles.description: Your primary care doctor. General health vitals, medications, and conditions. Mental health and sexual health excluded by default.

profiles.label: Specialist
profiles.description: Hospital specialist (cardiologist, oncologist, etc.). Clinical vitals and procedure history.

profiles.label: Psychiatrist / Mental Health
profiles.description: Mental health clinician. Psychiatric history and sleep indicators. Substance use is excluded — that requires separate Sanctuary Mode disclosure.

profiles.label: Social Worker
profiles.description: Social care professional. Social and housing context, support network, emergency contacts. No clinical detail by default.

profiles.label: Personal / Partner
profiles.description: Intimate or close personal sharing. Sexual health status and most recent STI screening date only. No credential required.

profiles.label: Carer / Family Member
profiles.description: Trusted carer or family member. Overview, medications, conditions, allergies, and emergency contacts. Mental health excluded unless you add it.

profiles.label: Legal Advocate / Solicitor
profiles.description: Legal professional acting on your behalf. You choose exactly what to share for this specific legal matter — nothing is shared by default.
